creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'd like to commit this pr but unfortunately the checksums of the
distfile does not match:
=> mplayer-1.0rc20100717.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in
/usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.rrr.de/~riggs/mplayer/.
mplayer-1.0rc20100717.tar.bz2                 100% of 8777 kB 1002 kBps
===>  Extracting for mplayer-1.0.r20100717_1
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for mplayer-1.0rc20100717.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for mplayer-1.0rc20100717.tar.bz2.

Also one of the mirrors does not provide the distfile:
=> Attempting to fetch from http://freebsd.unixfreunde.de/sources/.
fetch:
http://freebsd.unixfreunde.de/sources/mplayer-1.0rc20100717.tar.bz2: Not
Found

Do you know why the distfile checksum does not match? Was the distfile
rerolled?

Thanks,
Beat
